coreIssue: As a UX Lead, {{NAME}}'s consistent tardiness may be impacting her workload management and team dynamics. This bi-weekly check-in will explore how her punctuality affects her productivity and the current projects she's handling. Additionally, the conversation will address any support she needs from you to manage her priorities effectively.
openingQuestion: How do you feel your punctuality is impacting your workload and team collaboration, and what adjustments might help you manage this better?
listenFor: whether punctuality affects her workload management
if they feel team dynamics are impacted
whether she has a clear view of her current priorities
avoid: do not assume the reason for her tardiness
do not jump to solutions without understanding her perspective
goodOutcome: You and {{NAME}} have agreed on a specific adjustment to her schedule or workload to address the punctuality concern.
suggestedAction: Schedule a follow-up in two weeks to review the impact of the agreed changes on her punctuality and workload.
